title: Chef De Partie, Humpback
description:
Jigger & Pony Group is a leading hospitality company that owns and operates 5 restaurants and bars in Singapore. A pioneer in Singapore’s cocktail bar scene, the Group’s portfolio comprises of six cocktail bars and two restaurants.

Cocktail Bars

  • Jigger & Pony (No. 9 The World’s 50 Best Bars 2025, No. 3 Asia’s 50 Best Bars 2025)
  • Gibson – Timeless cocktail bar balancing balances ingredient‑driven creativity with classics
  • Live Twice – Cocktail bar inspired by mid-century modern Japan
  • Pop City - Japanese-lifestyle cocktail bar in Singapore’s Central Business District
  • Cosmo Pony - Convivial bar with a cosmopolitan soul in Jakarta
  • BOP - Korean cocktail dining bar in Tanjong Pagar

Restaurants:

  • Humpback – oyster bar and seafood bistro with a focused wine & cocktail list
  • Caffe Fernet – Modern Italian restaurant bar with a view of the Marina Bay waterfront

We are seeking for a candidate with passion in Culinary to join our Kitchen team at Humpback.


Job Description

  • Assist Sous Chef and team in the preparation of food in accordance with recipes and standards set by the restaurant.
  • Ensure quality of food
  • Monitor stock level and inventory
  • Maintain cleanliness and organization of work areas, including storage areas and kitchen equipment.
  • Complete preparations of house-made ingredients with proper care
  • Perform related duties as part of a tight-knit family of chefs

Job Requirement

  • At least 1 year of kitchen / culinary experience
  • Passionate for preparing high-quality food with respect for ingredients
  • Willingness to learn
  • Positive attitude
  • No split shift

postedCompany.description:
JIGGER & PONY PTE. LTD.

Jigger & Pony (Facebook.com/JiggerandPony) has been voted as Singapore’s Best Bar by industry peers and is led by Aki Eguchi, voted Singapore’s Best Bartender. Starting in 2012, Jigger & Pony family is a fast-growing hospitality group with 5 F&B concepts Jigger & Pony / Sugarhall / Humpback / The Flagship / Gibson operating in Singapore. The first namesake concept, Jigger & Pony, has cemented its reputation as one of Asia’s best craft cocktail bar and gained a reputation for outstanding hospitality.

Jigger & Pony, Sugarhall and Gibson has just been voted as one of Asia's 50 Best Bars for 2 years in a row.
postedCompany.name: JIGGER & PONY PTE. LTD.
